name: acc10
drl:
rule R1 when accumulate( Qe($b : n); $s : sum($b) ) then end
rule R2 when accumulate( Qe($b : n); $hi : max($b) ) then end
_finding: Empty-group sum vs max (annotated at round 19; the acc2 sibling): sum fires with identity 0 over the empty source; max returns null and never activates. Completes the five-aggregate empty-group family with acc2.
